title: Good but
review: This app has some  great features the daily exercises have been very helpful . The detailed feedback has really helped me minimize fillers in my speech . There appears to be some bugs as I have not received any new exercise  for  several days . I reached out to the support email several times and have not heard back . Will most likely unsubscribe

title: Wellspoken app is better
review: Wellspoken is a way better alternative

title: Orai review
review: Simple speaking practices with examples on how to speak clearly with proper pace. I see the value in working on communication skills so I’m enjoying this.

title: Moving to the next phase
review: I like the app but I have reached out to your tech support about moving to the next phase of learning but I have not got a response.

title: Not free
review: No free courses

title: AMAZING!!!!
review: It really helps me with my speech and now I am realizing that speech was not that well. This is very good if you are having trouble presenting.

title: Poor voice recording /activity errors
review: I liked the exercises and how it picked up on my tone and speed however a little while into using the app. It kept saying that it had poor network connection and would stop recording me every few seconds, but I’m sitting right next to my Wi-Fi with plenty of connection. And no other apps ever have this problem with speaking features on my phone. It was pretty frustrating because I liked how it was helping me but I just couldn’t get the app to actually work with the voice record recording feature

title: To Early to give feedback.
review: I will get this app a chance and go from there.

title: Suggestions
review: I wish it had profile pictures and avatars, and I also would like it to show me written feedback if I want it to but it’s still great as it is right now though.

title: Unusable
review: The app hosts videos on YouTube and YouTube prevents viewing from the app. So you know how bad this app is.

title: Woke content
review: I was excited about this app but soon found out it’s very political and on a climate change high. I deleted within minutes.

title: Misleading
review: App told me I was getting a 7 day free trial and charged me $17. Have tried to contact support on three occasions and have had no response. Avoid

title: Not free
review: u cannot do anything with just a basic plan, u have to pay for it

title: Woke Left Wing Propagandist app
review: They will give you Al Gore “environmental justice” speeches to analyze your “pace” and “tone.” How about keep your propaganda out of a speech improvement app. These type apps are a dime a dozen- find one that desires to help improve your speech - not push their climate change agenda.

title: Fraud
review: I cancelled the subscription and got billed anyway. Avoid this app, the author is a fraud and a cheater. This app needs to be banned permanently.

title: Can’t login
review: I just signed up for the paid plan and now I can’t access the app anymore. I don’t have a way to cancel the subscription if I can’t login. The login page just loads forever. Please help!

title: Some people thousands of dollars
review: Everyone can improve their communications skills. God gave us a voice and we often neglect its use. This app helps not only tune and fine tune the use of voice, but it helps one to value words. It’s one of the best investment one can have especially if you’re not tall, dark and handsome (addressing the guys here).

title: Great app
review: Omg this app is everything if you want to public speak, it’s so important to sharpen your words and skills when writing or speaking and this app will 100% help with that, it’s really great.

title: Doesn’t resize to iPads
review:
Not scaling to fit an iPad (specifically the Mini) automatically results in a one star rating. Orai isn’t a new app, nor is it cheap. There’s no excuse for not scaling. On the Mini, there’s a four inch black border around the app and the hit detection is off. Typing within the app is extremely frustrating because even if you hit the right key, a letter surrounding the key may detect the hit.

If you’re charging a $50 annual subscription, the least you can do is add scalability so when running it on an iPad, it doesn’t look like an app from 2012.

title: App does not respond when contacting customer service
review: Purchased an annual membership but doesn’t work. Contacted company 3 times and got to response.  So the app just took my money and ran.

title: Political agenda from the first lesson
review: There’s no need to make this app political.

title: My experience
review: Very bad and regret to buy it.

title: Speaking skills
review: I find the app highly useful because previously I was going to a Toastmaste Club but I moved my job location and it will be complicated to attend to the club . Using the app I save time when practicing because I do not need to attend to other location I can practice in my apartment at any time

title: Can’t Access Even with Paid plan
review: I cannot log in. When I request to reset my password, it states that links will be sent to my email, but I never received links (not in my inbox, spam, or trash folders). This has been going on for months. No way to contact customer support & it does not recognize my email on the web app. I genuinely like the app, and I hate that I had to write a review to get help.

title: Overall is practical
review: There are alot of bugs and issues in the app, the content is amazing but the technical aspect of the app is suffering, the UX is amazing, but the bugs are ruining it.

title: Good for recording rate of speech
review: The app has good information and does a fairly good job of providing feedback about the speed you are talking.  It’s not good at picking up tone and pauses in speech accurately and gives poor and incorrect data

title: ਸਕੈਮ ਐਪ
review: ਇਹ ਐਪ ਫ੍ਰੀ ਨਹੀਂ ਹੈ

title: The audio doesn’t get processed
review:
I attempted using the app both on my iPad and iPhone and used both headphones and no headphones but after doing the first lesson (control your pace) recording it does not process the recording. And you can not move on or get information back.
Your stuck on a limbo.
The initial recording works but afterwards it does not.

title: dinging me for repeating words?
review:
It’s very disappointing that Orai is not familiar with classical rhetoric devices.

To clarify, I was not repeating the same word immediately after it. I had a series of sentences that all began with the same word and that is what Orai found fault with.

title: Amazing product
review: Vanessa from Science of People recommended this app. I love the comprehensive features: recording my voice, comparing my speech with the original speakers, evaluating my recording in various metrics, and providing training based on my weaknesses. I’m excited about using it every day.

title: Sign up doesn’t work!
review: Would love to use app but none of sign ups methods worked

title: Got this app from ted talk
review:
Thank you so much Danish, I heard about this app one of the ted talk speeches of Danish about how to overcome fear of public speaking. 
literally danish didn’t shout out his application name on their, instead he showed this app features at the ending of his speeches. somehow in the description of that video i got the app name. 
I understand this review isn’t meaning in this rating. but I’d like to thank you. Let’s up your voice 😇 and spread your melodious vocal with public haha :D

title: Great but it needs improvement
review: When i finish each task and its getting my results it kicks me out of the app.

title: Paywall
review: All practices are hidden behind a paywall :/

title: Eh!
review: When I first downloaded this app, I loved it and bought the subscription. I didn’t know that there’s only a few courses. Now I’m finished with the courses and I can either talke them again or just go to the speech practice tab. It’s a nice short app with a few bugs.

title: Works great on a Mac!
review: Surprised to see how well it works on a mac. Now I can record my meetings and get instant feedback too!

title: Nice tool but confusing interfaces
review: I really like the idea of the tool but there are quite a few issues with the user interface. The app gives percentage scores for categories like pace, energy, fillers. When the scores are extremely high or low in percentage points, they make sense sort of. But when they are in the middle ranges like 48% or 67%, I feel very confused. Additionally I would get confusing feedback such as you were too fast at 205wpm. Reduce the number of pauses. So was i too fast or too slow?

title: ‘Journey’ feature doesn’t load; app crashes regularly
review: I really like the feel and appearance of this app, but it seems to be bugged in multiple places. Would appreciate support from the engineering team as I want to use this app, but can’t.

title: Decent App But Requires Work
review: First of, this is a good app trying to solve a complex problem. Kudos to the crew building this out. The app itself is engaging at first and the exercises are valuable. After a couple of weeks of using it every day I started getting annoyed at the bugginess. For example, as a paid member I am supposed to see the Orai Insights but I legit don’t see anything show up. I’ve emailed customer support and they’re looking into it, so now is a matter of waiting. There are other areas that are clunky, like the feedback piece after you finish every exercise. It lacks real insight into how the scoring is factored in and some of the graphs for energy are hard to read. If I had the chance to go back and not get a membership I probably would have and looked at other apps before hand.

title: Great app but buggy
review: The app is great. So far, I have learned a lot and has a lot of great content. However, I have noticed there is a lot of bugs. Sometimes when I do the video recordings, it says it cannot connect to the server. It also takes a while for sections to begin. Right now as we speak, I am stuck on a loading screen on the introduction section. It has been an hour so far. I was going to do a year subscription but I’ll do a month for now to see if the bugs get sorted and if the app gets more smooth.

title: Political content???
review: I actually liked the app but couldn’t help but notice that the content is political. Seriously?? I need to hear myself read text that’s undeniably bound to politics??? How disappointing.

title: Too Political
review: Seriously? The first two examples are of Obama’s farewell speech and a exert from Al Gores global warming book? You literally could have picked anything and you start the course out with those two back to back? I’m done. Keep politics out of self help apps.

title: Freezing after try to re-record
review: My app freezes often when I try to re-record sessions causing me to have to restart.

title: Not a happy customer.
review: After the trial period, I decided to pay for the yearly subscription. I liked the app and the feedback it provided. However, when I started doing compelling communication course, the app did not work properly. For every assignment, I tried recording 4-5 times, but it still kept asking me to record again and kept giving the recording error. It has been really frustrating as I have not got any feedback from many of the assignments in the course due to the recording error. The developers should fix these errors or give a refund for the subscription.

title: It’s terrible!
review: It freezes all the time. The keychain password does not work then it does not allow changing the password!

title: App crashes
review: Was very interested in this and the first couple minutes worked great but then the app crashes. I open it back up to start a lesson and then crashes again

title: I need a refund
review: I tried this app for 3 days while it was free. Then I decided to discontinue using it. I disconnected the account. But I get charged every month now.

title: It doesn’t recognize pauses accurately
review:
One of my goals is to not only be a better public speaker, but to enunciate more clearly. When I saw an app like Orai existed, i felt it was a good opportunity to learn new skills that I would need. 

Unfortunately, the app has many problems with detecting pauses. Every single practice, it says the sentences are ‘too long.’ No matter how long you pause for (I’ve sat in silence for 5 seconds just to see if it recognized the end of a sentence), or even if you say ‘end sentence’ or ‘period’, it ignores this and treats every sentence as a single, long sentence.

This problem means that you end up stalling and restructuring your speech unnaturally, defeating the entire purpose of the app.

The idea of this app is good, and I support its mission, but the inaccuracy of the technology means that I cannot recommend it.

title: Not useful anymore
review: I loved this app when it was first being developed. It analyzed my speeches and gave good recommendations. Now all it tries to do is to sign me up for a paid plan. There is nothing I can do without signing up for a plan. Completely useless now.

title: Too robotic
review: Doesn’t really take into account natural human speech patterns. Also, it’s kinda laggy, especially with the pace calculator!

title: Political
review: First exercise I have to hear an Obama speech and then some climate change lecture?  No thanks.  I’m sure there’s some BLM speech in there too.  President Trump can grab the attention of his audience and keep them alert and engaged but I will guarantee there’s no Trump speeches on here.  Plus the topics it wants me to speak about are a little boring.  The only thing I like is the parrot, it’s so cute.  Cancelled free trial.

title: Missing recordings
review:
This app was great until I started recording my own speeches. I have recorded twice now and lost both of those despite a stable
Internet connection. I submitted a complaint on the app but no one has reached out yet.

title: Great concept, but very buggy
review: I like the idea of this app, and I paid for it and have been using it often. But the app has a lot of bugs. You’re almost guaranteed to encounter one every other time you use it. I hope the developers take some time to focus on fixing issues rather than adding new features.

title: Awesome app. Please focus on fixing bugs :)
review:
Hi! First off, huge kudos to you guys for creating this app. I’m an software engineer trying to improve my soft skills and using software to do it is naturally compelling to me :)

There are some bugs in the app but definitely not a deal breaker. I understand it takes a lot of work to create a complex app like this. Any way I can submit bug reports? Would be willing to beta test also.

Keep up the good work!

title: Have to pay
review:
I can’t even try it without paying. 

Let me unlock the features and see if I really them.

title: Unbelievable app... when it works.
review: I’ll start by saying this. When this app works, it is absolutely amazing. Quite possibly my favorite app I’ve ever downloaded. The analysis provided after you give a practice speech provides all the details you could want in order to improve your speaking ability. However, I would say that only about half of the practice speeches I make actually end up being analyzed. My service isn’t great where I live, so I mostly rely on wifi, and about half of the time when I click “Get Results,” the app says “Lost connection, please record again.” I am hoping they will fix this bug in the future, and I will gladly change my review to five stars when they do.

title: Shred is love
review: I am really amazed at how easy this app makes it for me to speak I just wish it was free for everyone to enjoy😁👏

title: Great tool for remote meetings
review: Has been helping me a lot prepare for more and more digital zoom presentations. Highly recommend!

title: Terrible Experience
review: This is only the first day of my free trial and I am absolutely frustrated with the app. I can’t even complete a speaking exercise because the app said, “It’s taking too long to get to your results, but they’re not lost!” Then I had to redo the exercise over 20 times to get the same message... I will probably delete the app today without finishing the 7 day free trial because of this.

title: Not sure why but this app does not work for me at all
review: App is incredibly slow.

title: Best learning app
review: If you really want to learn public speaking, then I highly recommend you try this app out with their 7 day trial. I felt a change in my voice within the first 30 minutes of using it.

title: Super helpful!
review: Within an hour of use, I can already feel a difference in my voice and how I sound! Highly recommend.

title: Used to be great, but too pricey!
review: I’ve used Orai for a while now and it’s great. But the per month subscription is too much. I’d gladly pay $10 to $20 for this app, but I can’t pay in perpetuity. There are too many similar options in the App Store.

title: App opens now
review: Thank you!

title: Looks promising
review: The app definitely has potential and provides helpful resources. I constantly get WiFi error, which is super annoying considering I have a pretty fast internet... I also would like to know how can I reset my journey??

title: Detailed feedback
review:
This app does more than:
-Record your voice
-Give you sentences to read
-Video Lessons

It gives a detailed report, of how you speak. Ranging from:
-Pauses
-Pace of voice
-Tone of voice
-Variety in sound
-Clarification 
-Energy (emotion in voice)

This is so worth $9.99/month. Got any additional services, Orai?

title: App not allowing to subscribe!
review: Came across ted talk by Danish Dhamani in YouTube. Was inspired and tried to install this Orai app. I am surprised by the math calculations based on our speech. I want to fully use the app by subscribing app itself is not letting me to subscribe. Why isn’t the app user-friendly? How other users were able to use it the fullest and love the experience and why not me?

title: Not working
review: “sorry but we could not fetch this exercise” is the error message I received for the 2nd lesson. How can I resolve this issue ???

title: Constantly crashes
review: Constantly crashes and does not accurately depict voice fluctuation/confidence.

title: Wonderful app and great customer service
review: The app is awesome and, above all, they have great customer service. I had a small issue with billing and they resolved it promptly and were very helpful. They are very professional and the app is simply awesome. Thank you!

title: Disappointed
review:
I can’t get past the assessment. I’ve gone theough the process three times and when I have to rate myself the submit button doesn’t load and I get tired of waiting and have to start all over. 

Now I’m over it and deleted the app

title: Stupid waste of time
review: Title says it all.

title: App crashes immediately upon opening
review: Just installed on iPhone 8. Looking forward to checking it out but it crashes every time I try to load it.

title: Amazing
review: It’s an amazing and comprehensive app.

title: App crashes
review: The app crashes after every exercise on the latest OSX.

title: Pay
review: Have to pay for everything

title: So beneficial
review: I was introduced to this app through a fear of public speaking TED Talk. I am so excited that I decided to download. I have always had anxiety when it came to public speaking . This app gave me the confidence to speak during meetings , casual social events etc. It’s like my speech coach and I love it! Hats off to the developers . Outstanding  job with one .

title: This App is Great
review: I have never thought that I can have something in my phone like this app. This is a really helpful app.

title: Payment
review:
Hi Orai team,

I love the app, and have been using for 9 days now. When i upgraded to orai pro, it showed me indian rupees 99.99 for a year however charged me $ 100 on my card, when I switched back to a monthly plan at again shown as Indian rupees 9.99 but it charged me $ 10. Could you help me figuring it out? Cause I upgraded as i found the service and the cost great. I do have the screenshots of the same. Help me. Being a student this app can help me in many ways.

title: Great methodology
review: Orai is a great app for speakers of all types. There is something to learn for everyone and the learning is very deep. Great application of Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence to improve oration and public speaking. Orai is a great example of ML and AI helping people develop their very human skills. Good work, team Orai. Highly recommended!

title: Best app ever
review: I have always had a lot of passion when I speak but spent very little time listening to myself nor did I have a long term program to help me improve.... now I have both in Orai, this app is changing my life and I now KNOW that will be able to reach my potential in large measure thanks to Orai!!!

title: Highly effective
review: Fabulous App to improve public speaking and gaining confidence. It’s almost as if there is coach with you 24-7 and best way to practice and improve on your own. Highly recommended.

title: Innovative
review: The app helped me, very good.

title: Orai is excellent!
review: I starting using Orai today and am hooked !!

title: Love it!!
review: I didn’t even know I need an app like this but I’m obsessed!

title: Bah
review: Bah

title: Feedback is key
review: The app is very structured. Feedback is given back and transcript from speech is quite accurate. I’m blown away by the technology. I’m at the basic and thinking seriously about moving to pro

title: Revolutionary
review: This app is incredibly accurate and will only get better with time. Recognizes my accent pretty well. Love it!

title: Beat app I’ve downloaded and started using in 2019
review:
Best app for 2017 was Evernote
best app for 2018 was Trello

Those are high bars and Orai is that level of awesome. I just wish I knew it if it was Or-ay like hay or Or-I like Hi.or something else entirely.

title: College Speech Instructor
review: I believe Orai will be of great benefit in my class. I believe it will help students through practice to become better speakers. I shared the app with another speech teacher. She has a similar impression.

title: App crashes all the time during speech processing
review: Not as good as it once was.

title: 3 crashes in 10 min trial
review: I very much want to like this app and may try again after month or two, if a new version becomes available. I also had points where I could not click the done button.

title: Wonderful app
review: I stumbled across a talk by the creator of this app on YouTube. So glad i did! This app is amazing! I’ve tried one lesson so far, and am hooked. I’m really excited to see improvements in my presentation skills. Thank you!

title: Cool, but 10$ per month?!
review: Really? How about 5$ to buy, unlimited subscription? Disappointed.

title: Great app
review: I would recommend this app 10/10, I have a presentation to give tomorrow and I can already tell I have improved.

title: Like the innovative style but this accuses me of saying “um” when I rarely do
review: I really like the cute parrot, new tasks challenges, and more reiewing descriptions but I dislike that this app mistakes me fot saying ‘um’ when I actually do watch what I’m recording. It would claim that I made such a filler 6 and more times. Same with the clarity thing. This was never an issue when I was using the older version of this and always gained 0 fillers with great clarity. Same encounter when I use this from Android as well. I doubt that I’m the only one experiencing this.

title: Does not work
review: Despite the update, the app still crashes.

title: Best public speaking/presentation app!!!
review: I have read several books and watched numerous YouTube videos about public speaking and presenting. This is by far the most effective method out there! It helped me fine tune my public speaking in all aspects. I recommend it to anyone who is a novice or would like to become a better public speaker/presentation.

title: I got my own personal speech couch (YAY!)
review:
Never thought I can get my own speech couch that can give me feedback about my presentations with great accuracy, AND anytime I want!

I love the new updates and can’t wait for the new lessons.

title: Very helpful!
review: I’ve never practiced this way before and the feedback helps!

title: Beautiful app I have on my phone!
review: This app gives me something most apps cannot: the ability to improve my everyday home and work life! And it’s fun too!

title: Incompatible with Air Pods
review: Please make the mic work with AirPods and I promise to give a higher star review :)

title: Great idea
review: Love everything about this app except I cannot get it to work.... what am I doing wrong?  Have tried multiple times to record a speech and it stops 9 out of 10 times

title: Great
review: Love the app

title: Great app and interesting to use!
review: This app has a great concept and was actually helpful for my presentation in class.

title: Practice makes a perfect speaker
review: Practice makes a perfect speaker and this App is perfect for anyone looking to advance their power in effective communications. You need to run and not pause and get this App ASAP!!!!!

title: Has Potential
review: I want to love the app but I can’t get through a single recording session or training without an internet error message. I tried it on my home WiFi, work WiFi and cellular data however I continue to get an error message. After multiple attempts, I’m able to get it to work if I stop around 30 seconds. Hope this is fixed soon because I’m excited to see what this app is capable of.

title: Superb!!
review: So excellent and improves all the time. Well done!!!  Love this!!!!

title: Orai
review: Great coaching app!  Easy to get started. Immediate feedback that is actionable. Makes your very next communication better.

title: Using it almost daily
review: Everyone has to practice somewhere. In my experience, most people sound like they are practicing in front of their audience. With Orai there is no excuse for not practicing.

title: Orai app provide immediate value!!
review:
This app is tremendous!
Super easy to use and the personalized feedback is of immediate value!
Lots of value!
Many executives say improving one’s communication skills is the fastest way to enhance one’s career opportunities.
This app has helped every user I know better understand their own communication tendencies and improve key communication skills.  Fast!

title: Love this App
review:
I’ve loved this app since its first version.  It is very helpful in preparing for any speech.  I like the ability to write your speech in the app, but it would be even more helpful for this of us with an iPad keyboard to have the orientation turned to horizontal for better typing.  I love the fact that it syncs across all of your apple devices.
The analytics are phenomenal.  I know exactly how I’m doing with my tone and the number of “um”s I’ve stated in my speech.  Great app.

title: LILPUMPOOHLILPUMPYEA
review: ESKETITTTTTT

title: Helpful
review: This has helped me prep for speaking engagements. Great app!

title: This is a revolutionary app!
review: First of all, this app shocked me. A close friend of mine suggested this app because one of her friends is a developer of this app. She told me that I might find it useful to practice for an oral argument in our law school. Instantly, I realized this was going to save so many law students' lives. In fact, anyone who needs to practice this speech should definitely use it. I need to try out this app more to find out more pros and cons, but so far, this is great!

title: Speech recognition rate needs improvement
review: The speech recognition part is really bad, way worse than Google input. With this kind of low recognition rate, the app is basically useless to me.

title: Great preparation tool
review: I give it 4 stars only because of either a glitch that freezes the app or the disconnect that has occurred a few times as I tried to save a recording. 5 stars for the overall idea. I really look forward to what this will become.

title: Really helpful app
review: Speaking of one of those things we all do and all want to do better. This little app allows me work on my speaking in private so I can sound better in public.

title: One of my Favorite Apps
review: I met the developers at Imagine Cup. I've been hooked ever since.   I struggle with communicating on a daily basis, and this app has helped me practice my speech and articulate properly. I look forward to seeing my improvement over. Definitely recommended, not just for speech givers but everyone!

title: Fantastic product!
review: I plan on doing a Ted talk in the next 3 months!

title: Great prep!
review: Cool way and useful tool to help yourself prepare for public speaking.

title: Creative idea
review: Been looking for an app like this for awhile. As the other reviews suggest, the user should be able to save the recording AFTER seeing the results. The pop up message forcing to save is very annoying because if the results are not satisfactory, the user may want to repeat and improve their recording rather than saving it.

title: Love it
review: The application is worthwhile for those who are not an English native speaker and wanted to improve your speaking skill!

title: Nice idea but it doesn't work
review: I used it twice and it was great. But now the app stopped working. I tried everything but the microphone button seems to be permanently disabled. It's probably a bug.

title: Love it! Been looking for something like it.
review: What a great app! I've been looking for an app like this for awhile. Thank you!

title: Looking forward to more feature
review:
First, I LOVE this app! It's been making me practice speaking frequently and I can't believe it took so long for someone to come up with something so life-saving! 

That said, I find this version limited. I can't delete speeches that I previously saved, which takes up real estate on my phone. I would also like to see more exercises; for instance, right now there's only 1 tongue twister. Hope an improved version is coming soon.

title: Great little app
review: Just started practicing but it gives me a lot of good insights into how to articulate words.

title: GREAT idea but
review:
I am really enjoying this app, and the potential it has. However I have already run into something that is frustrating me! 

The vocal variation section seems to not note any variation in my speech at all. I have tried sounding sad, angry, asking questions, saying things that would end in exclamation points if written, and yet it only counts 1 change in variation, or none at all 0. 

At first I thought it was just my speech, until I tried it incredibly animated and it detected the words I said with 90% accuracy but failed to note any variation in my voice. 

If that was fixed, I would rate this app 5 stars immediately.

title: Interesting concept
review: The analysis portion looks good but I thought it would be more guided. Interface and making it more guided and game like would bring me back.

title: Good idea but very buggy
review: This app need to be updated. Sometimes the recording does not get recorded and sometimes the record button doesn't work. I had to open and close out the app several times. This app needs a lot of work on the back end. Hopefully it get fixed soon.

title: Great app!
review: Still working on it but so far a great app to improve your public speaking qualities. Interesting concept, hope they'll add more features in the future

title: The best!
review: I'm loving this app. I can see why just after a few uses how it helps with speech. Highly recommend

title: This is great! Toastmasters watch out!
review: I downloaded the app today and started practicing right away. I like the recording and feed back feature.this is a brilliant idea and love it already. Do add more challenges such as 5 minute speech etc

title: Love at first use
review: I moderate remote meetings and have been looking for something to help me improve my speech. The feedback features on pace and energy are great!

title: Horaii!
review: It's alright,but it would be better if you had some fun scripts for us to read or read along with the speaker or having a conversation.

title: So innovative. Well done.
review: Very creative and a great idea. I like how the app tells me when to speak louder and how not to sound too flat. It will be great to use when you are prepping for presentations and talks. Well done!

title: Awesome App!
review: Orai is super simple to use and the feedback is fantastic. My speech has already improved.

title: Fantastic app
review: A fantastic app created by a truly talented team. I have a fear of speaking in front of people, but am forced to almost daily with my job, so I'm really excited to start using this app to improve my performance!

title: HonestReviewer
review: I think all reviews on this app are fake and by friends. The um and like detector and voice tone things just flat at don't work

title: Great App!
review: Whether you're in business or in school, Orai finally leaves you to the confidence to speak in front of your peers. 5 stars!

title: Everyone Should Use Orai!
review: Orai is the perfect way to practice your public presentation skills before you have to step on stage. 10/10

title: Brilliant!!
review: Was interesting to see the various techniques used on Orai to help strengthen and build confidence in my ability to speak fluidly. Recommend to anyone!

title: Orai FTW! :)
review: There are apps, there are good apps, there are great apps, and then there's Orai!  Simple, easy to use, and quite intuitive, Orai is like a personal speech coach, and an absolute must if you are engaging in storytelling & presentations.  Orai FTW!

title: Very useful
review: App gives you great advice on becoming better speakers and getting rid of bad speaking habits such as saying like, um, etc.

title: Very Helpful!
review:
The app has helped me improve my communication skills! I feel much more comfortable presenting after practicing in this app just a few times. 
I would highly recommend everyone to try it out.

title: Helps a lot
review: Used to be a terrible speaker...Orai is honestly helping me overcome my fear and anxiety of public speaking.

title: AI at its best
review: Fantastic app. No glitches.

title: Great idea!!
review: As someone who has struggled in the past with giving oral presentations, this is a great tool to improve. It feels good to practice every day and exercise a muscle that doesn't always get used in my day-to-day life but is invaluable. I will definitely be using this app in the future!

title: Fantastic
review: User-friendly. I really enjoy that it transcribes my speeches and allows for playback at any point.
